# `manufacturing` — manufacturing templates

**Industry:** Manufacturing / Supply Chain  ·  **Templates:** 3

Phishing templates targeting manufacturing and supply chain personnel

Phishing-simulation templates for **authorized** security awareness training with [GoPhish](https://getgophish.com/) and [HailBytes SAT](https://hailbytes.com/sat?utm_source=github&utm_medium=folder_readme&utm_campaign=gophish-training-templates). See the [repository README](../README.md) for setup and the [full template catalog](../docs/CATALOG.md) for every category at a glance.

## Templates

| Template | File | Attack vector | Difficulty | Est. click rate |
|---|---|---|---|---|

## Template details

### Supplier Portal Update Required

- **File:** [`supplier_portal_update.html`](supplier_portal_update.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 35-55%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.Company}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/manufacturing_education.html`](education/manufacturing_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Supplier portal update required — re-registration needed
  - Procurement: Your vendor portal access is expiring
  - Action Required: Update your supplier account credentials
- **Operator notes:** Aimed at procurement, vendor-management, and supply-chain staff. The portal re-registration pretext fits routine B2B workflows and slips past casual skepticism. Most effective when the portal name mirrors a real procurement system.

### SAP Ariba – Purchase Order Review

- **File:** [`sap_ariba_po.html`](sap_ariba_po.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 35-55%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.Date}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/manufacturing_education.html`](education/manufacturing_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - New purchase order awaiting your review
  - Action required: PO 4500291837 needs approval
  - A purchase order has been routed to you in SAP Ariba
- **Operator notes:** Procurement workflow lure for manufacturing/supply-chain roles. Routine PO routing lowers suspicion.

### Coupa – Supplier Banking Verification

- **File:** [`coupa_supplier_banking.html`](coupa_supplier_banking.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** advanced · **Est. click rate:** 30-50%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/manufacturing_education.html`](education/manufacturing_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Action required: verify your supplier banking details
  - Coupa: remittance information must be re-verified
  - Your supplier payment details are pending verification
- **Operator notes:** Banking-verification (BEC-adjacent) lure for vendor/AP-facing staff. Advanced; train on out-of-band verification.

## How to use

1. In GoPhish, go to **Email Templates → New Template** and paste the HTML from the file above. Set a subject line from the suggestions.
2. Create a **Landing Page** (see [`../landing-pages/`](../landing-pages/)) to capture the click, and — where a training page is listed — redirect clickers to it so they get immediate education.
3. Configure a realistic **Sending Profile** and launch to a consented, in-scope group. Schedule during business hours for realism.

> **Before sending:** customize sender names, domains, logos, and any brand impersonations to match your engagement and your authorization scope. These templates are for authorized training only.
